<!-- SECTION architecture-overview — the opening of a plugin page, under ## Architecture.
     One short paragraph, plain and spoken: what this plugin IS and WHY it is useful,
     generalized the way you'd explain it to a colleague. Lead with the value, not a
     command list or the implementation. Second person, present tense. Close with one
     clause on how it composes at a glance (stands alone / enhances X / needs Y). Keep the
     weeds — flags, file paths, internal names — out; that is the Reference half's job. -->

## Architecture

<One plain-spoken paragraph: what the plugin is, why it's useful, and how it composes at a glance.>
